Brāhmaṇo mātulaṃ rakkhati / Brāhmaṇā mātule rakkhanti
Buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.\nDhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.\nSaṅghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.
Buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi\nDhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi\nSaṅghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi
Buddho Sāvatthiyaṃ dhammaṃ desesi.\nBhikkhū dhammaṃ suṇiṃsu.
Cakkhuṃ bhikkhave anattā.\nYadanattā taṃ netaṃ mama,\nnesohamasmi, na meso attāti.
Dhīvaro narāya macchaṃ āharati.\nDhīvarā narānaṃ macche āharanti.
Dveme bhikkhave antā pabbajitena na sevitabbā
Dānaṃ dadāmānā sīlāni rakkhamānā\nmanussā sagge uppajjanti.
Ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā bārāṇasiyaṃ viharati isipatane migadāye
Ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā bārāṇasiyaṃ viharati isipatane migadāye.
Ete kho bhikkhave ubho ante anupagamma majjhimā paṭipadā tathāgatena abhisambuddhā
Evaṃ me sutaṃ: ekaṃ samayaṃ Bhagavā Sāvatthiyaṃ viharati

Evaṃ me sutaṃ:
ekaṃ samayaṃ Bhagavā
Sāvatthiyaṃ viharati
Jetavane Anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
Kassakassa sūkaro dīpaṃ dhāvati.\nKassakānaṃ sūkarā dīpe dhāvanti.
Kassako kakacena rukkhaṃ chindati.\nKassakā kakacehi rukkhe chindanti.
Manusso kusalañ ca pāpañ ca jānāti.
Mātulassa sahāyako rathaṃ āharati.\nMātulānaṃ sahāyakā rathe āharanti.
Narassa putto bhattaṃ yācati.\nNarānaṃ puttā bhattaṃ yācanti.
Putto mātulamhā pañhaṃ pucchati.\nPuttā mātulehi pañhe pucchanti.
Putto mātulassa odanaṃ dadāti.\nPuttā mātulānaṃ odanaṃ dadanti.
Putto mātulena saha candaṃ passati.\nPuttā mātulehi saha candaṃ passanti.
Putto naraṃ passati / Puttā nare passanti
Sace samaṇo dhammaṃ deseyya, manussā suṇeyyuṃ.\nYadi samaṇā dhammaṃ deseyyuṃ, manussā suṇeyyuṃ.
Sace tvaṃ sīlaṃ rakkheyyāsi, sukhaṃ labheyyāsi.\nSace tumhe sīlaṃ rakkheyyātha, sukhaṃ labheyyātha.
Samaṇo narena saddhiṃ gāmaṃ gacchati.\nSamaṇā narehi saddhiṃ gāmaṃ gacchanti.
Satthā bhikkhūnaṃ dhammaṃ desento anukampaṃ upādāya

Seyyathāpi bhikkhave puriso
Addasā kho Bhagavā āyasmantaṃ
Ānandaṃ dūrato va āgacchantaṃ,
disvā āyasmantaṃ Ānandaṃ etad avoca.
